block_00: Pick your trading tools and learn what to short-sell
block_03: Hi there! In this digest, you'll find more details about ETFs, learn how to choose trading tools, and see which stocks are currently in decline. Find out what success other traders have achieved, which upcoming tournaments you can test your strength in, and why you should never give up. Read on and be productive!
block_06: ETF — the Most Diversified Trading Instrument
block_07: ETF, or exchange-traded fund, is a ready-made portfolio of securities and a trading instrument that often tracks an underlying index. Let's figure out what it is and how to start trading ETFs on IQ Option.
block_09: Trading Tools and How to Choose Them
block_10: So, you've probably already decided on your trading goals. It's time to choose the right trading tools. Let's remember what tools are available on the IQ Option platform that will help you better organize your trading routine.
block_13: Sometimes short selling may bring as many opportunities as buying. Here are 4 stocks that keep a steady decline in the past month or even the past year. Can you take advantage of the downtrend?
block_15: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_41: Warren Buffett began buying shares of the Washington Post Company in 1973, after which their price fell by 20% and remained at this level for three years. However, Warren didn't change his mind and continued to purchase shares, spending about $11,000,000. By the end of 2007, his stake in the Washington Post had grown by more than 10,000% to $1.4 billion.
